name: Terminus

passives.name: Juxtaposition
passives.effects: Basic attacks {{tip|on-hit}} against champions alternate between ''Light'' and ''Dark'' hits, each one granting a bonus for 5 seconds that stacks up to 3 times. ''Light'' hits grant {{pp|6 to 8 for 3|1;11;14|type=level}} {{as|'''bonus''' armor}} and {{as|'''bonus''' magic resistance}} while ''Dark'' hits grant 10% {{as|armor penetration}} and {{as|magic penetration}}, for a total of {{pp|6*3 to 8*3 for 3|1;11;14}} '''bonus''' resistances and 30% resistances penetration at maximum stacks of each.

effects_structured.raw: Basic attacks deal 30 bonus magic damage on-hit.
Basic attacks on champions alternate between Light and Dark hits, each granting a 5s buff that stacks up to 3.
Light hits grant bonus armor and magic resistance; Dark hits grant armor and magic penetration. Max stacks provide 30% penetration and higher resists.

simpleDescription: Kill minions periodically to heal and grant gold to a nearby ally

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Light stack resist values scale with level; Dark stacks grant 10% penetration per stack up to 30%.
Terminus is modeled as a sustained on-hit dual-state cycle: alternating Light and Dark champion hits build separate short-duration stack sets for resist stats and penetration.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
